event.description: {CovLStrv2{{t{The size_t argument with possible value {0}, which is passed to function {1} in <string.h>, shall have a positive value that is no greater than the size of the smallest object passed to the function through a pointer parameter.}{0}{{code{memcpy(void *, void const *, unsigned int)}}}}}}

{CovLStrv2{{t{The size_t argument with possible value {0}, which is passed to function {1} in <string.h>, shall have a positive value that is no greater than the size of the smallest object passed to the function through a pointer parameter.}{0}{{code{memcpy(void *, void const *, unsigned int)}}}}}}
